overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring the interior of a space station or spacecraft. The character walks through a reception area, lounge, and corridor with industrial sci-fi aesthetics featuring metal piping, artificial lighting, and futuristic furniture.

events.description: character begins walking past the reception desk toward the doorway

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the reception area, approaching and passing the service desk

notable_agents.action: standing behind the reception desk, facing the character

entered.detail: white curved desk with vertical slat railing and an NPC behind it
vertical white slats forming a partition behind the reception desk
exposed metal piping running along the green painted wall
simple wooden chair with slatted back in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a reception lobby with industrial green walls and exposed piping. A reception desk with white vertical railing occupies the center, staffed by an NPC. The character begins walking past the desk toward a doorway at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: crew lounge with seating and vending

events.description: character walks through doorway from reception into the lounge area

agents.ego_description: walking through the lounge area, passing sofas and vending machines while exploring the space

entered.detail: long red upholstered sofa against the right wall
tall white vending machine with illuminated display
counter with coffee maker and supplies on a metal shelving unit
low wooden table with items on top in the seating area

segments.scene_description: The character enters a lounge area furnished with a red sofa, wooden tables, and a vending machine. The space features warm artificial lighting and industrial decor with exposed piping. The character continues walking through the room toward the far end.

events.description: character approaches doorway leading to bathroom or small utility room
character slows and stops at the bathroom doorway

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the doorway to a small room, slowing to a stop

entered.detail: archway entrance with metallic frame leading to bathroom area
white bathroom sink with mirror visible through the doorway
tall white storage lockers against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a doorway at the end of the lounge, revealing a bathroom or utility room with a sink vanity and metal lockers. The character slows down and stops at the entrance to the small room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a space station interior that transitions from a formal reception lobby into a cozy lounge and finally a utilitarian service room. It begins in a lobby characterized by industrial green walls and exposed piping, moving past a central reception desk with white vertical railings. As the character passes through a doorway, the environment shifts into a lounge area filled with warm artificial lighting, a red sofa, and wooden tables. The scene then progresses past a vending machine toward the far end of the room before turning toward a final opening. The movement concludes as the camera slows to a stop at the entrance of a small utility room containing metal lockers and a sink vanity.
